headline: This Senior Living Stock Is Up 45%. One Investor Just Doubled Down With $179 Million
summary: Sonida Senior Living runs senior housing communities nationwide, providing independent living, assisted living, and memory care services.

headline: This REIT Stock Rose 16% in a Year, but a Major Holder Still Fully Exited a $35 Million Position
summary: Global Net Lease is a REIT specializing in mission-critical, net-leased commercial properties across the U.S. and Europe.
